Ravi Chaurasiya

DevOps Engineer | CI/CD | Linux | AWS | Banking Domain

Noida, India | ravi.chaurasiya491@gmail.com

About Me

DevOps Engineer with 3+ years of experience in managing and supporting large-scale banking applications. Strong expertise in Linux system administration, CI/CD pipeline automation, and deployment processes. Skilled in improving software delivery efficiency by automating workflows from development to production.

With a strong foundation in Quality Assurance, I bring deep understanding of system behavior, testing strategies, and production stability. This enables me to build reliable, scalable, and high-availability systems.

DevOps Expertise

  • CI/CD pipeline implementation using GitHub Actions and Jenkins
  • Automation of build and deployment workflows
  • Linux system administration and shell scripting
  • Production deployment support and release management
  • Troubleshooting and resolving production issues
  • Containerization basics using Docker
  • Cloud exposure with AWS (EC2, S3, IAM)

Professional Experience

System Engineer – DevOps

Tata Consultancy Services | Aug 2022 – Present

  • Managed CI/CD pipelines using GitHub Actions and Jenkins
  • Supported application deployments ensuring high availability
  • Automated operational tasks using shell scripting
  • Worked extensively on Linux-based production environments
  • Collaborated with banking clients for deployment and issue resolution

QA & Testing Background

  • Experience in Functional, Regression, UAT, and Performance testing
  • API testing using Postman
  • IBM MQ message validation
  • Defect tracking using JIRA
  • Root Cause Analysis (RCA) for production issues

Banking Domain Expertise

  • NEFT, RTGS, Cross-border payments
  • ISO 20022, SWIFT MT & MX messaging
  • Real-time payment gateway systems

Career Vision

To build scalable, automated, and reliable systems by leveraging DevOps practices, cloud technologies, and continuous integration pipelines. Focused on evolving into a highly skilled DevOps / Site Reliability Engineer.
